description: Plugin-distributed hooks for applied-statistics. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable statistical smells in analysis files (.py/.ipynb/.R/.Rmd/.qmd/.md/.sql) — (1) a p-value with no effect size/CI, (2) 3+ tests with no multiple-comparison correction, (3) a parametric test with no assumption check, (4) correlation language paired with causal verbs. Set APPLIED_STATS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
